en.extract:
The hooded cuckooshrike (Coracina longicauda) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae. It is found in the New Guinea Highlands.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.

The '''hooded cuckooshrike''' ('''''Coracina longicauda''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Campephagidae]]. It is found in the [[New Guinea Highlands]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].

zh.extract:
黑冠鹃鵙（学名：Coracina longicauda）是山椒鸟科鸦鹃鵙属的一种。分布于印度尼西亚和巴布亚新几内亚。其自然栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润山地。
种加词 longicauda 意为“长尾的”。


参考文献
BirdLife International. Coracina longicauda. The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species 2009.   [2010-10-22] （英语）.
